summary: Completed e2e testing of TrendScout AI Blog System. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI elements verified working - blog listing page, single blog post page, navigation, and all required components (intro, featured products, sections, product highlights, conclusion, tags, CTA).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/blog/posts returns 200
Backend: Response has posts array and count fields
Backend: Blog posts have required fields (id, slug, title, category, published_at, status)
Backend: Posts sorted by published_at (newest first)
Backend: Posts have embedded products with thumbnails
Backend: GET /api/blog/posts/{slug} returns 200 with full content
Backend: Blog post content has intro, sections, product_highlights, conclusion structure
Backend: GET /api/blog/posts/nonexistent-slug returns 404
Backend: Known slugs 'top-trending-automotive-products-this-week-march-13-2026' returns valid post
Backend: Blog posts have valid tags array
Backend: Blog posts have ai_generated boolean flag
Backend: Blog posts have SEO meta_description under 200 chars
Frontend: /blog page renders with data-testid='blog-page'
Frontend: Blog listing shows 2 blog post cards with data-testid='blog-post-card-X'
Frontend: Blog cards show title, category badge, date, tags, product thumbnails
Frontend: Blog cards have 'AI Generated' badge (violet badge)
Frontend: Clicking blog card navigates to /blog/:slug
Frontend: /blog/:slug renders with data-testid='blog-post-page'
Frontend: Single post has intro section with border-l-4 styling
Frontend: Single post has 'Featured Products' section with 5 product cards
Frontend: Single post has 4 article sections (Market Overview, Top Products Analysis, Seller Opportunities, Tips for Launching)
Frontend: Single post has 'Product Highlights' section
Frontend: Single post has conclusion in gradient box
Frontend: Single post has tags (#trending automotive products, etc)
Frontend: Single post has CTA button with data-testid='blog-cta' linking to /signup
Frontend: 'Back to Blog' link navigates back to /blog
Frontend: Blog link in navigation bar has data-testid='nav-link-blog'
Frontend: Blog nav link correctly navigates to /blog
Frontend: Page title includes 'TrendScout Blog' for SEO

test_credentials.note: Blog viewing is public (no auth required). Blog generation endpoints require admin auth.

seed_data_creation: None - Used existing blog posts generated via AI: 'top-trending-automotive-products-this-week-march-13-2026' and 'top-trending-garden-outdoors-products-this-week-march-13-2026'
context_for_next_testing_agent: TrendScout AI Blog System fully tested. Endpoints: (1) GET /api/blog/posts - PUBLIC, returns list with posts array and count, excludes content field. (2) GET /api/blog/posts/{slug} - PUBLIC, returns full post with content object containing intro, sections, product_highlights, conclusion. (3) GET /api/blog/posts/nonexistent returns 404. (4) POST /api/blog/generate/{category_slug} - ADMIN ONLY, generates AI blog post. (5) POST /api/blog/generate-all - ADMIN ONLY, generates for top 8 categories. Frontend: BlogPage.jsx at /blog shows listing, BlogPostPage.jsx at /blog/:slug shows full article. Navigation 'Blog' link in LandingLayout.jsx. All data-testids present for testing.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - Blog generation uses real GPT 5.2 via emergentintegrations
